title: Phaeocephalum fuscum
taxonomy: Phaeocephalum fuscum is classified within the family Acanthaceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as the acanthus family. This family is part of the order Lamiales, which is a larger group of flowering plants that also includes mint and snapdragon families. The genus Phaeocephalum is a monotypic genus, meaning it consists of a single species. The classification of Phaeocephalum fuscum is further supported by its physical characteristics, such as its leaf shape and flower structure.
